hero.title: Over 2 billion people have yet to hear the name of Jesus globally.
hero.subtitle: A lack of gospel access is the greatest injustice known to humanity. We’re on a mission to change that and we invite you to join us.

features.title: Why the Unreached?
features.description: Knowing the return of Christ hinges upon Great Commission fulfillment (Matthew 24:14), we focus all our energy on unreached people to see Revelation 7:9 fulfilled—every nation, tribe, people, and language worshipping before God’s throne.

features.title: What We Do
features.description: Through our four core ministries—Compassion Ministries, Evangelism, Discipleship, and Church Planting—we focus solely on unreached people by empowering indigenous leaders to reach their own communities and countries with the gospel of Jesus Christ.

features.title: Get Involved
features.description: We swing wide the door for you to join us by taking a short-term team from your church to attending the Ascend Internship to moving to Thailand long-term. All these opportunities empower the long-term goal of reaching unreached communities.

secondarySection.title: Access Campaign
secondarySection.description: This campaign funds Within Reach Global’s evangelism, discipleship, and church planting efforts among unreached communities in Thailand and its surrounding nations, enabling us to multiply missionaries and locally-led church planting movements.
